title: Mobbility [Addon: Combat Roll]
description: Gives mobs player dodging abilities for Combat Roll - dodge attacks with roll animations just like players.
body:
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Es8xro21/images/1a30601fe94fe70523d1a10b644df036b7512bd9.gif)

## Features

- **Player-Like Dodging**: Mobs dodge attacks with roll animations, just like players
- **Automatic Ability**: All mobs gain dodge capability on spawn
- **Combat Roll Integration**: Uses Combat Roll mod mechanics
- **Configurable**: Dodge chance, ranged/melee dodge, spell cast interruption

## How It Works

Event-based dodge detection system (no AI goals):

**Fabric Events:**
- `ServerLivingEntityEvents.ALLOW_DAMAGE` - Detects melee and projectile hits before damage applies
- `UseItemCallback.EVENT` - Detects ranged weapon usage (bow, crossbow, trident)
- `MobbilityEvents.SPELL_CAST_START` - Detects spell casts targeting the mob

**Forge Events:**
- `LivingAttackEvent` - Detects melee and projectile hits before damage applies
- `ArrowLooseEvent` - Detects player bow shots with charge calculation
- `LivingEntityUseItemEvent.Finish` - Detects crossbow/trident usage
- `MobbilityEvents.SPELL_CAST_START` - Detects spell casts targeting the mob

**Dodge Process:**
1. Event fires when mob is targeted by attack/spell
2. System checks: dodge chance, cooldown, humanoid model, casting state
3. If conditions met: triggers Combat Roll animation, cancels damage/spell cast
4. Dodge strategy adapts to mob health (aggressive/balanced/defensive)

## Configuration

Fully customizable via `config/mobbility/combat_roll.toml`:

<details>
<summary>Dodge Settings</summary>

```toml
[combatRoll]
enabled = true
mobRollChance = 0.3
dodgeRangedAttacks = true
dodgeMeleeAttacks = true
cancelCastOnDodge = true
allowDodgeDuringChanneling = false
```
</details>

## Requirements

- **Minecraft**: 1.20.1
- **Fabric Loader**: 0.15.11+ (Fabric version) OR **Forge**: 1.20.1-47.4.10+ (Forge version)
- **Mobbility [Core]**: Required core mod (matching platform)
- **Combat Roll**: The combat mod this addon integrates with
- **Fzzy Config**: For configuration
